content: Execution required 3 iterations: cycle 1 (initial 67-agent write + reviewer rejection + rewrite), cycle 2 (6 infrastructure gap fixes from gap-cycle-2), cycle 3 (2 cross-reference fixes from gap-cycle-3). Each re-entry cycle was progressively lighter — cycle 2 fixed 6 items across 6 files, cycle 3 fixed 2 reader arrays in 1 file. The diminishing fix scope per cycle confirms healthy convergence.
sourceEvidence: iteration: 3. cycleDetails.gapsAddressed: ['CR-004', 'CR-005']. cycleDetails.writerReviewerIterations: 1. Previous cycles: cycle 2 addressed AC-004/AC-005/CR-002/CR-003/DC-W05/MK-W03.

history.reason: Cold start — first observation from initial factory run
